name: IdsEdwClmSrcDtlFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH DB2_IN AS (SELECT c.CLM_SK, c.CLM_ID, COALESCE(cd.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, c.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, c.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, c.SRC_FILE_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_SRC_DTL c JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd ON c.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = cd.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE cd.TRGT_CD = 'OPTUMRX' AND c.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.OPTUMRXRunCycle}), XFM AS (SELECT CLM_SK, CLM_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SRC_FILE_ID FROM DB2_IN) SELECT CLM_SK, CLM_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SRC_FILE_ID FROM XFM
